scripts.build:ext: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); const src = 'node_modules/@mediapipe/face_mesh'; const dst = 'face_mesh'; fs.mkdirSync(dst, { recursive: true }); fs.readdirSync(src).forEach(f => { if (fs.statSync(path.join(src, f)).isFile()) fs.copyFileSync(path.join(src, f), path.join(dst, f)) })" && esbuild background/service-worker.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/service-worker.js --format=esm --platform=browser && esbuild content/overlay.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/content/overlay.js --platform=browser && esbuild content/main-world.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/main-world.js --platform=browser && esbuild popup/popup.tsx --bundle --outfile=popup/popup.js --platform=browser --jsx=automatic
